sentences.english: The Student Affairs Office announces that the campus café, currently located in the basement of Wilson Hall, will be relocated to the first floor of the newly renovated Morrison Student Center beginning next month.
sentences.korean: 학생처에서 윌슨홀 지하에 있는 캠퍼스 카페가 다음 달부터 새로 리모델링된 모리슨 학생센터 1층으로 이전된다고 발표합니다.

sentences.english: The move is intended to improve student access, as the current location has been difficult to find for new students and visitors.
sentences.korean: 이번 이전은 학생 접근성 향상을 위한 것으로, 현재 위치는 신입생과 방문객이 찾기 어려웠습니다.

sentences.english: The new space is also significantly larger, allowing for more seating and an expanded menu.
sentences.korean: 새 공간은 상당히 더 커서, 더 많은 좌석과 확장된 메뉴가 가능합니다.

sentences.english: The café will remain closed for one week during the transition.
sentences.korean: 카페는 전환 기간 동안 1주일간 휴업합니다.

sentences.english: Have you heard about the café moving?
sentences.korean: 카페가 이전한다는 거 들었어?

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Yes! I'm not sure how I feel about it, actually.
sentences.korean: 응! 사실 어떻게 느끼는지 잘 모르겠어.

sentences.english: What do you mean?
sentences.korean: 무슨 뜻이야?

sentences.english: I think it's great news.
sentences.korean: 나는 좋은 소식이라고 생각하는데.

sentences.english: Well, the basement location was kind of inconvenient, I agree.
sentences.korean: 음, 지하 위치가 좀 불편한 건 맞아.

sentences.english: But I liked that it was quiet down there.
sentences.korean: 하지만 거기가 조용한 게 좋았어.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: It never got too crowded.
sentences.korean: 절대 너무 붐비지 않았거든.

sentences.english: I get that, but think about the bigger picture.
sentences.korean: 이해해, 하지만 더 큰 그림을 생각해봐.

sentences.english: The Morrison Center is right in the middle of campus.
sentences.korean: 모리슨 센터는 캠퍼스 한가운데에 있어.

sentences.english: Everyone passes through there between classes.
sentences.korean: 수업 사이에 모두가 거기를 지나가거든.

sentences.english: It'll be so much easier to just grab coffee on your way to a lecture.
sentences.korean: 강의실 가는 길에 커피 한 잔 사기가 훨씬 쉬워질 거야.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: That's true. And you said the new place is bigger?
sentences.korean: 그건 맞아. 그리고 새 장소가 더 크다고 했지?

sentences.english: Way bigger. And an expanded menu — apparently they're adding hot food options.
sentences.korean: 훨씬 더 커. 그리고 메뉴도 확장된대 — 따뜻한 음식 옵션을 추가한다더라.

sentences.english: Right now they only have sandwiches and pastries.
sentences.korean: 지금은 샌드위치와 빵류밖에 없거든.

sentences.english: Okay, that does sound good.
sentences.korean: 그건 좋겠다.

sentences.english: I guess the week of downtime is a small price to pay.
sentences.korean: 1주일 쉬는 건 감수할 만한 작은 대가인 것 같아.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Exactly. It's just one week.
sentences.korean: 맞아. 단 1주일이야.

sentences.english: I think once it opens, everyone's going to love the new spot.
sentences.korean: 열리면 모두가 새 장소를 좋아할 거야.

sentences.english: The man expresses his opinion about the café relocation.
sentences.korean: 남자가 카페 이전에 대한 의견을 표현합니다.

sentences.english: State his opinion and explain the reasons he gives for holding that opinion.
sentences.korean: 그의 의견과 이유를 설명하세요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
